title: 20cm, 18cm, 16cm Plastic Plant Pots, Plant Pots with Drainage Holes and Saucers, A Set of 3 Flower Pots, Modern Decorative Planters, Blue
features: 20/18/16 cm PLANT POT SET: The perfect plastic plant pot set. Flowerpots of different sizes can perfectly solve the needs of different plant root systems for different soil depths, and can also solve the needs of the same plant for flowerpot sizes in different periods.Ideal for small to medium-sized houseplants, such as Aloe Vera, Snake Plants, Pothos, Peace Lily, ZZ Plants, Orchid, Succulent, or Herbs.

EXCELLENT DRAINAGE FUNCTION WITH SAUCER: There are multiple drainage holes at the bottom of each flower pot to easily drain excess water, ensure that the roots are well ventilated, and avoid necrosis caused by rot. Each size pot comes with a matching saucer to catch excess water and keep the table or floor clean.

PREMIUM QUALITY & LIGHTWEIGHT: PROFIKLA flower pot is made of extra thick, strong and eco-friendly PP material, which is lightweight, durable and has no peculiar smell. Can withstand extreme temperatures and harsh weather conditions without cracking and peeling damage, ensuring longevity.

MINIMALIST DESIGN: The classic appearance of PROFIKLA plastic flower pots is superimposed with imitation granite texture, which looks like ceramics from a distance and granite from a close view. It can add some chic elements to your home or office.
IDEAL GIFT: PROFIKLA plant pot is a great gift idea for all gardening enthusiasts for occasions like Earth Day, World Environment Day, New Year, Housewarming, birthdays and Christmas.
description: Product Description PROFIKLA plastic flower pots are lightweight and convenient, durable, easy to change soil when changing pots, easy to wash and sterilize, sturdy and unbreakable.20/18/16cm size pots combination can meet most indoor plants growing requirements, which is the best choice for home flower and planting. They can enrich your garden. Benefits of growing potted plants 1. Increase the interest of life: potted plants can add fun to family life and make people feel the vitality of life and the beauty of nature. 2. Improve air quality: Potted plants can absorb harmful substances in the air, release oxygen and improve air quality. 3. Reduce stress: viewing and caring for potted plants can help people relieve stress and improve their mood. 4. Increase social interaction: Social interaction can be based on the topic of flowers and gardening, which resonates and promotes communication and improves social skills. 5. Increase indoor humidity: some potted plants have a strong transpiration effect, which can increase indoor humidity and improve the indoor environment. 6. Dust stagnation effect: potted plants with wide leaves can reduce dust very well.
